description: Button that can be pressed with the use key

pressed.description: Emitted when the button is pressed

unpressed.description: Emitted when the button is unpressed

off_skin.description: The skin of the model to use when the button is off/not pressed

on_skin.description: The skin of the model to use when the button is on/pressed

start_pressed.description: Whether the button should start pressed/on

reset_delay_ms.description: How many milliseconds the button should stay pressed for, set to -1 to stay pressed forever

toggle_mode.description: Whether the player should also be able to turn the button off with the use key
